terms.definition_scope: Observable condition of an evidence artifact before belief, action, publication, escalation, or institutional response.
terms.boundary_note: Applies to artifacts and chains only; not subject verdict language.
terms.non_authorization_statement: This term does not authorize classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or fake/real verdict implications.

terms.definition_scope: Rule that artifact condition statements must not become subject guilt, truthfulness, legitimacy, or conduct statements.
terms.non_authorization_statement: This term does not authorize classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or fake/real verdict implications.

terms.definition_scope: Bounded description of how source chain, custody signals, and publication path support artifact condition statements.
terms.boundary_note: Source posture language only; not a source truth verdict.
terms.non_authorization_statement: This term does not authorize classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or fake/real verdict implications.

terms.definition_scope: Where origin, custody, or chain-of-record information is missing, weak, or cannot support confident structural description.
terms.boundary_note: Names missing context; does not prove misconduct.
terms.non_authorization_statement: This term does not authorize classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or fake/real verdict implications.

terms.definition_scope: Disciplined posture when available signals cannot support further structural description without false certainty.
terms.boundary_note: Protects against false certainty; not a verdict substitute.
terms.non_authorization_statement: This term does not authorize classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or fake/real verdict implications.

terms.definition_scope: Governed limit on what Hoax.ai may say about artifact condition without crossing into verdict, accusation, or certification language.
terms.boundary_note: Limits public and future engine language; not scoring.
terms.non_authorization_statement: This term does not authorize classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or fake/real verdict implications.

terms.definition_scope: Governed relationship between a claim and the source material used to support, limit, qualify, or reject that claim.
terms.boundary_note: Structural discipline for reference integrity; not fact-check authority.
terms.non_authorization_statement: This term does not authorize classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or fake/real verdict implications.

terms.definition_scope: Interpretive vulnerability in AI-mediated, generated, edited, recomposed, or synthetic artifacts under contextual misreading pressure.
terms.boundary_note: Does not prove fake, manipulation, or subject guilt.
terms.non_authorization_statement: This term does not authorize classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or fake/real verdict implications.

terms.definition_scope: Connected sequence of artifact, source, claim, context, provenance, limitation, and interpretation that allows evidence to be responsibly understood.
terms.boundary_note: Continuity language only; not truth certification.
terms.non_authorization_statement: This term does not authorize classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or fake/real verdict implications.

terms.definition_scope: Loss, compression, stripping, flattening, or misplacement of surrounding context that weakens evidence meaning.
terms.boundary_note: Does not prove manipulation, deception, or misconduct.
terms.non_authorization_statement: This term does not authorize classifier, tool, upload, scoring, or fake/real verdict implications.
